build.command: make clean; make GPU_TARGET=CDNA4 ATTN_B=4 ATTN_N=4096 ATTN_H=64 ATTN_H_KV=8 tk_kernel_bkwd tk_kernel_bkwd_prep

command: docker run --rm --entrypoint bash --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --ipc=host --network=host -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -v /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/workspace -w /workspace/sources/references/hipkittens/kernels/attn/gqa_backwards onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori -lc 'export PYTHONPATH=/workspace/sources/references/hipkittens/src/common/pyutils:${PYTHONPATH:-}; python3 /workspace/tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/probe_hipkittens_gqa_bwd_synth_lse.py --batch 4 --seq 4096 --heads 64 --kv-heads 8 --dim 128 --warmup 5 --iters 20'

interpretation.status: B4 schedule donor validated, not a DSv4 SharedKV promotion yet
interpretation.relevance_to_e2e_sharedkv: The current e2e SharedKV calls are MBS4. This result shows HipKittens' query-major backward producer remains fast at the same batch size. DSv4 C4 SharedKV still needs D512 sparse selected-key support, dOriKV output, dCmpKV compressed-group epilogue, and dSinks before latency can be promoted.
interpretation.next_gate: Implement a HIP/HipKittens-derived SharedKV owner that consumes q, kv/original window, compressed groups, indices, output/lse, and dO, then compare B4 C4 selected=640 against the e2e per-call C4 hook around 60.6 ms and the old B1 compressed-only C4 gate around 11.0 ms.
